title: Blood Red
description:
A simple 16x Default edit made for PvP.

The pack has short swords, low-fire, better leaves, a "PvP"-Bow and many other useful features. :)
body:
A simple Minecraft 16x PvP texturepack based around the color of a dark red. The pack itself is a default edit. With some additional PvP textures:

- Short Swords
- Bow and Crossbow (With diffrent chargestages)
- Better leaves (seethrough)
- adjusted Bow and Crossbow hand positions
- Seethrough Inventory
- Low-fire
- shorter plants

The pack is made for anyone who enjoys some vailla like textures while playing PvP or just normal Survival. The pack should not have a big effect on the performance of the game and is therefore made for everyone.
